01 Dec 2016

Informal Xcoders tonight at Cyclops. I’ll arrive around 6, but come when you can!

29 Nov 2016

Game on, Ohioans. Overwhelm the Trumpkins with a giant protest. Show the loser the truth. https://t.co/wDm8TQLSpI

29 Nov 2016

The newest update to No Man’s Sky is amazing. It’s like a brand new game with all the coolest stuff of the original.

28 Nov 2016

Marble on stress putty. https://t.co/Hz1GgQv5bl

28 Nov 2016

Artboard Layers are the bee’s knees! Check out the free trial of OmniGraffle 7 if you haven’t already. https://t.co/kDRaMrY0Kc https://t.co/rvdLKCMRdF

28 Nov 2016

“Those institutions can in all likelihood weather four years of his mental instability and toxic incitement. But not necessarily.” https://t.co/mo8KTc37uc

27 Nov 2016

Fuuu. Just discovered that @1password on my Mac hasn’t synced since June.

26 Nov 2016

We spent the afternoon and evening running bib and chip pick-up for the Seattle half marathon. It was fun to say hello to so many runners.

25 Nov 2016

Fence fixed. Solstice lights hung. And just one coffee into the day.

25 Nov 2016

I’m thankful for a dry morning, so I can fix the fence that blew down onto our driveway.

25 Nov 2016

And they were delicious. https://t.co/3j9O2sdWjg

24 Nov 2016

I’m just 2 pages in, but this might be a seminal paper. Wow. “Polymorphism, Subtyping, and Type Inference in MLsub” https://t.co/nowf1ftzG9

24 Nov 2016

And can you start those proceedings before the inauguration? https://t.co/eC2wTZeAc7

24 Nov 2016

It’s a beautiful day for a run! https://t.co/TXwNaMsgKi

24 Nov 2016

Oh, hell yes. Spot on. A minority of the electorate put an abomination in the White House, but we owe him nothing but contempt. https://t.co/QAy94zDrxI
